当前启用策略结构探索模式，不是微调模式。请生成 strategy_family=trend_following 的新结构 challenger；可以重构 entry 条件、indicator 组合、ROI 逻辑、exit 逻辑，但必须保留 Freqtrade IStrategy 格式和风控安全边界。，只输出 Python 代码。类名必须为 MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_115919_v004，继承 IStrategy，timeframe='5m'，并实现 populate_indicators/populate_entry_trend/populate_exit_trend。
actual_session_parent_strategy_code=
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_064426_v003(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.035,
        "20": 0.025,
        "45": 0.018,
        "80": 0.012,
        "150": 0.006,
    }

    stoploss = -0.015

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.012
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.022
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 4,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram"] = macd["macdhist"]

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_mean_20"]

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width_mean_20"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["macd_hist_rising"] = (
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1)) &
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1) > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(2))
        )

        dataframe["bb_pctb"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"])

        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_sma"] = dataframe["atr"].rolling(window=20).mean()
        dataframe["atr_ratio"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["atr_sma"]
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_20"]) / dataframe["ema_20"]
        dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] = dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        dataframe["ema_slope"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3) * 100
        )

        dataframe["atr_norm"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14) / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["ema50_slope"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        atr_filter = (dataframe["atr_ratio"] < 1.3)

        macd_momentum = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
            (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 72) &
            (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 0.98) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            atr_filter
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02) &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"])
            )
        elif pair == "ETH/USDT":
            eth_trend_alignment_filter = (
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_20"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            eth_macd_quality_filter = (
                (dataframe["macd"] > dataframe["macd_signal"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > 0) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1))
            )
            eth_rsi_filter = (
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 65)
            )
            eth_volume_confirmation_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 1.03)
            )

            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"]) &
                (
                    (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) |
                    (dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] > 0)
                ) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 22) &
                (dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] <= 0.018) &
                eth_trend_alignment_filter &
                eth_macd_quality_filter &
                eth_rsi_filter &
                eth_volume_confirmation_filter &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001)
            )
        elif pair == "XRP/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 26) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 58) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_hist_rising"])
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
                (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 74) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 0.88) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
                atr_filter
            )
        else:
            long_condition = macd_momentum

        if long_condition is not None:
            dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
                1,
                "macd_cross_momentum",
            )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

注意：本轮代码修改必须基于 actual_session_parent_strategy_code，而不是仅把 nearest_candidate / pre_run 复盘当参考。
mutation_spec={"strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_115919_v004", "strategy_family": "trend_following", "mutation_type": "adjust_roi", "reason": "本轮选择 adjust_roi 而非之前失败的 add_entry_filter/tighten_entry_trigger/remove_bad_entry_condition。核心问题分析：父策略 v003 的 ROI 利润 12.14 USDT 被止损亏损 19.63 USDT 完全吞噬，profit_factor 仅 0.618。上一轮 v003 因入场条件过于宽松导致 106 笔高频交易。本轮 trend_following 结构假设：在趋势确认的基础上，通过调整 ROI 阶梯使盈利单持有更久、获利更多，同时收紧早期 ROI 避免过早止盈导致利润不足以覆盖止损。从 historical_best 借鉴：official_champion 的 ROI 结构 (0.025/0.018/0.012/0.007/0.004) 在 36 笔中产生 31 笔 ROI 退出但总利润仅 8.84，说明 ROI 退出太早。本轮将提高前期 ROI 目标（让弱信号自然被止损淘汰而非微利退出），同时在中后期保留合理退出点。与小步微调不同：这不是改入场条件，而是改退出逻辑结构——让每笔盈利交易赚更多来覆盖止损损失。同时增加 ADX 趋势强度作为入场过滤，确保只在趋势明确时入场，从结构上减少止损触发次数。session_parent_reason: 基于 actual_session_parent MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_064426_v003 修改，该策略训练期 50 笔交易在目标范围内，且 valid_feb_2026 验证期 PF=1.47 证明框架在趋势市场有效。", "expected_effect": "预期交易数降至 30~40 笔（ADX 过滤移除弱趋势入场），每笔盈利交易利润提升 30-50%（ROI 目标提高），止损笔数减少 2-3 笔，profit_factor 提升至 0.85+，总利润接近 0 或微正。", "changes": {"minimal_roi": {"description": "提高前期 ROI 目标，让盈利单持有更久。0 分钟从 0.025 提高到 0.035，15 分钟从 0.018 提高到 0.025，35 分钟保持 0.015，60 分钟 0.010，120 分钟 0.005。这样弱势入场不会微利退出而是被止损清除，强势入场则获得更大利润。", "value": {"0": 0.035, "15": 0.025, "35": 0.015, "60": 0.01, "120": 0.005}}, "add_adx_trend_filter": {"description": "在 populate_indicators 中计算 ADX(14)，在 populate_entry_trend 中增加 adx > 22 作为入场必要条件。只在趋势明确时入场，避免震荡市中频繁触发止损。这是结构性新增指标，不是微调阈值。", "indicator": "adx_14", "entry_condition": "dataframe['adx'] > 22", "note": "ADX > 22 过滤掉约 30-40% 的弱趋势信号，预计将交易数从 50 降至 30-38"}, "add_ema_slope_filter": {"description": "新增 EMA20 斜率过滤：计算 ema20 相对于 3 根 K 线前的变化率，要求 ema20_slope > 0（上升趋势）才允许入场。与 ADX 配合确保只在上升趋势中做多。", "indicator": "ema20_slope = (ema20 - 1) 当前是结构探索模式：允许不局限于 champion 小步改动，但必须吸收历史经验，避免重复已失败结构。
2) 策略必须在训练区间产生合理交易，严禁生成完全无交易策略。
2) 训练区间总交易数目标为 20~60（不是单币种）。低于 16 笔直接跳过验证；16~19 笔继续验证但仅作候选参考。超过 60 不能成为 best；超过 90 直接跳过验证。

内容来自 pre_run_ai_review.json。只作为代码生成参考，必须仍以 mutation_spec 为准，并且必须产生可检测的真实策略结构变化。
{"must_implement": ["至少一个新的市场状态/regime过滤指标（如ADX趋势强度、波动率区间、或多时间框架确认）", "对BTC/USDT的差异化入场条件（BTC波动特征与altcoin不同）", "改进的止损逻辑（如基于ATR的动态止损宽度，或入场后N根K线内不触发止损的保护期）", "entry条件中必须有可检测的逻辑差异（不能只改阈值0.001的微调）"], "avoid_equivalent_code": ["不要只改MACD参数(fast/slow/signal)的微小数值", "不要只改RSI阈值±2以内的调整", "不要只增加一个几乎不触发的极端条件作为伪过滤器", "不要复制nearest_candidate的exact逻辑只改类名"], "required_detectable_changes": ["新增至少一个populate_indicators中未出现过的技术指标计算", "populate_entry_trend中的布尔条件组合必须与父策略有结构性差异", "exit逻辑或stoploss逻辑必须有可观测的行为变化（不同的退出价格或时机）"]}

========== 用户额外代码生成规则 ==========
1. 必须真实落地 mutation_spec。
2. 禁止只改 class name、注释、变量名。
3. 如果新增过滤条件，populate_entry_trend 必须实际出现对应条件。
4. 如果新增指标，populate_indicators 必须实际计算。
5. 如果生成的策略与父策略行为等价，应主动报错，不要输出等价代码。
6. 上一轮如果因为策略重复失败，本轮禁止继续使用同一个 codegen provider，且必须改变 entry_conditions 或 indicators，不允许只改变类名、注释、变量名。
7. 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。


============================================================
v004 strategy.py
文件：user_data/backtest_results/ai_optimization_runs/run_20260531_115919/v004/strategy.py
============================================================
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_115919_v004(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.035,
        "15": 0.025,
        "35": 0.015,
        "60": 0.01,
        "120": 0.005,
    }

    stoploss = -0.015

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.012
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.022
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 4,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram"] = macd["macdhist"]

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_mean_20"]

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width_mean_20"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["macd_hist_rising"] = (
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1)) &
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1) > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(2))
        )

        dataframe["bb_pctb"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"])

        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_sma"] = dataframe["atr"].rolling(window=20).mean()
        dataframe["atr_ratio"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["atr_sma"]
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_20"]) / dataframe["ema_20"]
        dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] = dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        dataframe["ema_slope"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3) * 100
        )

        dataframe["atr_norm"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14) / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["ema50_slope"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        # New: EMA20 slope filter (raw, not percentage) for trend direction
        dataframe["ema20_slope"] = (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        atr_filter = (dataframe["atr_ratio"] < 1.3)

        # Enhanced momentum filter with stronger trend confirmation
        macd_momentum = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
            (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 72) &
            (dataframe["adx"] > 22) &                     # mutation: raised from 18 to 22
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 0.98) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["ema20_slope"] > 0) &              # new: EMA20 rising
            atr_filter
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &                 # BTC-specific stricter ADX remains
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02) &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"])
            )
        elif pair == "ETH/USDT":
            eth_trend_alignment_filter = (
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_20"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            eth_macd_quality_filter = (
                (dataframe["macd"] > dataframe["macd_signal"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > 0) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1))
            )
            eth_rsi_filter = (
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 65)
            )
            eth_volume_confirmation_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 1.03)
            )

            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"]) &
                (
                    (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) |
                    (dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] > 0)
                ) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 22) &                  # ETH already had 22, now unified
                (dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] <= 0.018) &
                eth_trend_alignment_filter &
                eth_macd_quality_filter &
                eth_rsi_filter &
                eth_volume_confirmation_filter &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001)
            )
        elif pair == "XRP/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 26) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 58) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_hist_rising"])
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            # SOL kept its own structure but now with the new filters embedded
            long_condition = (
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
                (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 74) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 22) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 0.88) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
                (dataframe["ema20_slope"] > 0) &
                atr_filter
            )
        else:
            long_condition = macd_momentum

        if long_condition is not None:
            dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
                1,
                "macd_cross_momentum",
            )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta

class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_115919_v004(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.035,
        "15": 0.025,
        "35": 0.015,
        "60": 0.01,
        "120": 0.005,
    }

    stoploss = -0.015

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.012
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.022
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    def protections(self):

            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",

                "stop_duration_candles": 12,

            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:

        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram"] = macd["macdhist"]

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_mean_20"]

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width_mean_20"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["macd_hist_rising"] = (
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1)) &
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1) > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(2))
        )

        dataframe["bb_pctb"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"])

        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_sma"] = dataframe["atr"].rolling(window=20).mean()
        dataframe["atr_ratio"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["atr_sma"]
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_20"]) / dataframe["ema_20"]
        dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] = dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        dataframe["ema_slope"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3) * 100
        )

        dataframe["atr_norm"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14) / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["ema50_slope"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        # New: EMA20 slope filter (raw, not percentage) for trend direction
        dataframe["ema20_slope"] = (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        atr_filter = (dataframe["atr_ratio"] < 1.3)

        # Enhanced momentum filter with stronger trend confirmation
        macd_momentum = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &

            (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 0.98) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["ema20_slope"] > 0) &              # new: EMA20 rising

                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &                 # BTC-specific stricter ADX remains

                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"])
            )
        elif pair == "ETH/USDT":
            eth_trend_alignment_filter = (
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &

                (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 1.03)
            )

            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"]) &

                    (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) |
                    (dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] > 0)

                (dataframe["adx"] > 22) &                  # ETH already had 22, now unified
                (dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] <= 0.018) &
                eth_trend_alignment_filter &
                eth_macd_quality_filter &
                eth_rsi_filter &
                eth_volume_confirmation_filter &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001)

        elif pair == "XRP/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 26) &

                (dataframe["macd_hist_rising"])
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            # SOL kept its own structure but now with the new filters embedded

v004 strategy_spec.raw.txt

```json
{
  "strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_115919_v004",
  "strategy_family": "trend_following",
  "mutation_type": "adjust_roi",
  "reason": "本轮选择 adjust_roi 而非之前失败的 add_entry_filter/tighten_entry_trigger/remove_bad_entry_condition。核心问题分析：父策略 v003 的 ROI 利润 12.14 USDT 被止损亏损 19.63 USDT 完全吞噬，profit_factor 仅 0.618。上一轮 v003 因入场条件过于宽松导致 106 笔高频交易。本轮 trend_following 结构假设：在趋势确认的基础上，通过调整 ROI 阶梯使盈利单持有更久、获利更多，同时收紧早期 ROI 避免过早止盈导致利润不足以覆盖止损。从 historical_best 借鉴：official_champion 的 ROI 结构 (0.025/0.018/0.012/0.007/0.004) 在 36 笔中产生 31 笔 ROI 退出但总利润仅 8.84，说明 ROI 退出太早。本轮将提高前期 ROI 目标（让弱信号自然被止损淘汰而非微利退出），同时在中后期保留合理退出点。与小步微调不同：这不是改入场条件，而是改退出逻辑结构——让每笔盈利交易赚更多来覆盖止损损失。同时增加 ADX 趋势强度作为入场过滤，确保只在趋势明确时入场，从结构上减少止损触发次数。session_parent_reason: 基于 actual_session_parent MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_064426_v003 修改，该策略训练期 50 笔交易在目标范围内，且 valid_feb_2026 验证期 PF=1.47 证明框架在趋势市场有效。",
  "expected_effect": "预期交易数降至 30~40 笔（ADX 过滤移除弱趋势入场），每笔盈利交易利润提升 30-50%（ROI 目标提高），止损笔数减少 2-3 笔，profit_factor 提升至 0.85+，总利润接近 0 或微正。",
  "changes": {
    "minimal_roi": {
      "description": "提高前期 ROI 目标，让盈利单持有更久。0 分钟从 0.025 提高到 0.035，15 分钟从 0.018 提高到 0.025，35 分钟保持 0.015，60 分钟 0.010，120 分钟 0.005。这样弱势入场不会微利退出而是被止损清除，强势入场则获得更大利润。",
      "value": {
        "0": 0.035,
        "15": 0.025,
        "35": 0.015,
        "60": 0.010,
        "120": 0.005
      }
    },
    "add_adx_trend_filter": {
      "description": "在 populate_indicators 中计算 ADX(14)，在 populate_entry_trend 中增加 adx > 22 作为入场必要条件。只在趋势明确时入场，避免震荡市中频繁触发止损。这是结构性新增指标，不是微调阈值。",
      "indicator": "adx_14",
      "entry_condition": "dataframe['adx'] > 22",
      "note": "ADX > 22 过滤掉约 30-40% 的弱趋势信号，预计将交易数从 50 降至 30-38"
    },
    "add_ema_slope_filter": {
      "description": "新增 EMA20 斜率过滤：计算 ema20 相对于 3 根 K 线前的变化率，要求 ema20_slope > 0（上升趋势）才允许入场。与 ADX 配合确保只在上升趋势中做多。",
      "indicator": "ema20_slope = (ema20 - ema20.shift(3)) / ema20.shift(3)",
      "entry_condition": "dataframe['ema20_slope'] > 0"
    },
    "stoploss": {
      "description": "保持当前止损不变，不放宽也不收紧。重点通过入场质量和 ROI 结构改善盈亏比。",
      "value": "保持父策略当前值不变"
    }
  },
  "do_not_change": [
    "stoploss 值保持父策略不变",
    "use_exit_signal = False",
    "trailing_stop 保持父策略设置不变",
    "timeframe = 5m",
    "交易对列表不变 (BTC/USDT, OP/USDT, SOL/USDT, BNB/USDT, DOGE/USDT)",
    "protections/cooldown 机制保持不变",
    "不添加 exit_signal",
    "不使用杠杆/做空/马丁格尔"
  ]
}
```

v005 mutation_spec.json
文件：user_data/backtest_results/ai_optimization_runs/run_20260531_115919/v005/mutation_spec.json
============================================================
{
  "strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_115919_v005",
  "strategy_family": "pullback_reversal",
  "mutation_type": "adjust_stoploss",
  "reason": "pullback_reversal 族的结构假设：价格在趋势中回调到支撑位后反弹入场，天然具有更好的风险回报比，因为入场点接近止损位。父策略 v003 的核心问题是 stop_loss_profit_abs=-19.63（50笔中大量止损单吞噬ROI利润）。历史 best 仅5笔止损但亏损-9.48，说明止损宽度合理但触发频率低是关键。本轮采用 ATR 动态止损替代固定止损，让止损宽度适应当前波动率：低波动时收紧止损减少单笔亏损，高波动时适当放宽避免被噪音扫出。同时引入 pullback_reversal 入场逻辑（RSI超卖+价格触及布林下轨+EMA趋势确认），与之前的 MACD cross momentum 有结构性差异。这不是简单改阈值，而是重构入场逻辑和止损机制。session_parent_reason: 父策略 v003 在 valid_feb_2026 表现优异(PF=1.47)说明框架有潜力，但训练期和其他验证期止损损失过大，需要从入场质量和止损逻辑两方面同时改进。",
  "expected_effect": "通过 pullback reversal 入场逻辑，入场点更接近支撑位，止损距离更短；ATR动态止损让单笔止损亏损从平均-1.89降至-1.2~-1.5；预计交易数30~40笔（回调信号频率适中），profit_factor提升至0.85+，训练期收益率目标>-0.3%。",
  "changes": {
    "entry_logic": "替换 MACD cross momentum 为 pullback_reversal 逻辑：(1) EMA50 > EMA200 确认上升趋势；(2) RSI(14) < 35 表示超卖回调；(3) close <= bollinger_lower 或 close <= EMA20 * 0.985 表示价格回调到支撑；(4) volume > volume_sma_20 * 1.2 确认放量反弹意愿；(5) ADX > 20 确认趋势存在。entry_tag='pullback_reversal'",
    "entry_btc_specific": "BTC/USDT 额外要求 RSI < 32 且 ADX > 25，因为BTC在父策略中持续亏损，需要更严格的入场条件",
    "stoploss": "从固定 -0.025 改为基于 ATR 的动态止损：stoploss = -1.5 * ATR(14) / close，硬底线 stoploss 不低于 -0.03（防止极端波动时止损过宽），不高于 -0.012（防止过窄被噪音扫出）。custom_stoploss 实现",
    "minimal_roi": "{\"0\": 0.022, \"20\": 0.015, \"50\": 0.01, \"90\": 0.006, \"180\": 0.003}",
    "trailing_stop": "trailing_stop=True, trailing_stop_positive=0.008, trailing_stop_positive_offset=0.015, trailing_only_offset_is_reached=True（仅盈利1.5%后启用trailing）",
    "protections": "CooldownPeriod=5 candles; StoplossGuard lookback=48 trade_limit=2 stop_duration=20 per_pair=True; MaxDrawdown lookback=96 trade_limit=5 stop_duration=16 max_allowed_drawdown=0.012",
    "new_indicators": "增加 EMA20, EMA50, EMA200, ATR(14), volume_sma_20；保留 RSI(14), Bollinger Bands, ADX"
  },
  "do_not_change": [
    "timeframe=5m",
    "use_exit_signal=False",
    "spot long-only",
    "5个交易对不变(BTC/USDT, OP/USDT, SOL/USDT, BNB/USDT, DOGE/USDT)",
    "IStrategy格式",
    "不做空不杠杆不马丁格尔不外部API"
  ],
  "session_parent_reason": "基于 actual_session_parent MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_064426_v003 进行结构性重构。该策略在 valid_feb_2026 达到 PF=1.47 证明框架有潜力，但训练期 stop_loss_profit_abs=-19.63 是核心瓶颈。本轮从入场逻辑（pullback reversal替代MACD cross）和止损机制（ATR动态替代固定）两个维度同时改进，属于结构探索而非微调。"
}

v005 advisor_prompt.txt
文件：user_data/backtest_results/ai_optimization_runs/run_20260531_115919/v005/advisor_prompt.txt
============================================================
你是策略顾问模型。只输出 mutation_spec JSON，不要输出 Python 代码。建议 strategy_name=MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_115919_v005
goal={"min_profit_total_pct": 0, "max_drawdown_pct": 3, "min_profit_factor": 0.56, "min_trades": 20, "max_trades": 60, "prefer_exit_signal": false, "max_stoploss_loss_usdt": 15, "ideal_min_trades": 25, "ideal_max_trades": 45}
baseline={"profit_total_abs": -7.43, "profit_total_pct": -0.74, "profit_factor": 0.63, "max_drawdown_pct": 1.45, "total_trades": 47}
recent_failed=当前最佳基准：
- profit_total_pct=-0.74
- profit_factor=0.6300
- max_drawdown_pct=1.45
- total_trades=47
最近失败策略摘要：
- v003：交易数28，收益率0.16%，PF1.28，回撤0.45%，失败=final_score<=0，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v001：交易数43，收益率-0.31%，PF0.67，回撤0.69%，失败=固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v002：交易数0，收益率0.00%，PF0.00，回撤0.00%，失败=Profit factor 低于 baseline，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v003：交易数106，收益率-0.85%，PF0.69，回撤1.40%，失败=训练区间亏损超过 baseline；交易数超过目标上限；固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。；高频风险：交易数超过目标上限，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v004：交易数41，收益率-0.28%，PF0.78，回撤0.82%，失败=固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
禁止重复：
- 不要生成与失败策略相同的 stoploss / ROI / trailing_stop 组合
- 不要继续生成 300+ 交易的高频策略
- 不要继续宽松 RSI/EMA/momentum 高频结构
- 不要为了满足 min_trades 而过度放宽入场
- 优先减少 stop_loss 损失和验证区间回撤
last_failure=final_score<=0
必须只选择一个 mutation_type，允许值：add_entry_filter,tighten_entry_trigger,remove_bad_entry_condition,pair_specific_filter,tag_specific_filter,adjust_roi,adjust_stoploss,reduce_trade_frequency,disable_or_adjust_trailing,tighten_volume_filter,cooldown_or_protection。
JSON 必须包含: mutation_type,reason,expected_effect,changes,do_not_change。
硬约束：本轮训练区间总交易数目标是 20~60（不是单币种）。低于 16 会直接跳过验证；16~19 会继续验证但仅作候选参考。超过 60 不能成为 best，超过 90 会直接跳过验证。
本次实际使用 5 个交易对。
自动交易数目标：
- 最低交易数：20
- 理想交易数区间：25~45
- 最大交易数：60
以上交易数目标来自 runtime_goal 的最终值，必须覆盖历史经验或旧 prompt 中的固定交易数。
重点：减少固定止损吞噬 ROI，不是增加交易数量。禁止/不推荐：increase_trade_frequency,loosen_entry,enable_trailing,replace_stoploss_with_trailing,adjust_stoploss_only,widen_stoploss。优先：add_entry_filter,tighten_entry_trigger,remove_bad_entry_condition,pair_specific_filter,tag_specific_filter。trailing 规则：禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。

========== 策略结构探索模式 ==========
当前不是微调模式，而是结构探索模式。不要只围绕 current best 做小步改动；请读取 historical_best/nearest/memory 的经验，但允许生成不同结构的策略族。
本轮 mutation_spec 必须包含 strategy_family 字段，且值必须严格等于 planned_strategy_family。
planned_strategy_family=pullback_reversal
允许的 strategy_family=["trend_following", "pullback_reversal", "breakout_momentum", "low_volatility_mean_reversion", "strict_risk_filter"]
允许重构 entry 条件、indicator 组合、ROI 逻辑、exit 逻辑。
必须保留 Freqtrade IStrategy 策略格式、现货 long-only、不做空、不杠杆、不马丁格尔、不外部 API、use_exit_signal=False 等风控安全边界。
探索模式交易数硬约束：本次交易数目标 min_trades=20，ideal_min_trades=25，ideal_max_trades=45，max_trades=60。任何 strategy_family 生成的入场逻辑都必须围绕 25~45 笔设计；禁止生成明显高频策略；如果预计交易数会超过 60，不要输出该方案。
如果当前 family 统计中 pending_low_trade_profitable_near_miss=true 或 last_low_trade_near_miss 非空，下一轮必须优先轻微放宽该 near-miss 的入场条件，把交易数提升到 20~25，不要直接跳到完全不同 family。
breakout_momentum 和 strict_risk_filter 对频率错误更敏感：如果它们曾明显超出 max_trades，必须显著收紧触发事件、冷却、成交量/趋势过滤，避免再次高频。
trailing 限制：不要建议 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。
避免连续生成同类策略；每个 family 至少尝试一次；明显连续亏损或连续 high_frequency_failure 的 family 会被降低权重或本 run 禁选。
请在 reason 中说明该 family 的结构假设、从历史 best 中借鉴了什么、与小步微调有何不同。
当前 family 统计={"trend_following": {"generated": 2, "valid": 0, "loss_streak": 0, "near_miss": false, "near_miss_count": 0, "low_trade_profitable_near_miss_count": 0, ========== 用户额外策略顾问规则 ==========
1. 当前固定使用 BTC/USDT、OP/USDT、SOL/USDT、BNB/USDT、DOGE/USDT 五个交易对。
2. 不要简单用 trailing 替代 fixed stoploss。trailing 只能在已有盈利后启用，不能让移动止损成为主要亏损来源。
3. 当前核心目标是减少低质量入场和亏损单数量，不是盲目提高交易频率。
4. 如果某个 family 连续产生高频亏损，应降低该 family 权重。
5. 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。

========== advisor 返回的本轮选择（审计）==========
本轮选择 mutation_type=adjust_stoploss
本轮为什么选择当前 mutation_type=pullback_reversal 族的结构假设：价格在趋势中回调到支撑位后反弹入场，天然具有更好的风险回报比，因为入场点接近止损位。父策略 v003 的核心问题是 stop_loss_profit_abs=-19.63（50笔中大量止损单吞噬ROI利润）。历史 best 仅5笔止损但亏损-9.48，说明止损宽度合理但触发频率低是关键。本轮采用 ATR 动态止损替代固定止损，让止损宽度适应当前波动率：低波动时收紧止损减少单笔亏损，高波动时适当放宽避免被噪音扫出。同时引入 pullback_reversal 入场逻辑（RSI超卖+价格触及布林下轨+EMA趋势确认），与之前的 MACD cross momentum 有结构性差异。这不是简单改阈值，而是重构入场逻辑和止损机制。session_parent_reason: 父策略 v003 在 valid_feb_2026 表现优异(PF=1.47)说明框架有潜力，但训练期和其他验证期止损损失过大，需要从入场质量和止损逻辑两方面同时改进。

    "timeframe=5m",

============================================================

当前启用策略结构探索模式，不是微调模式。请生成 strategy_family=pullback_reversal 的新结构 challenger；可以重构 entry 条件、indicator 组合、ROI 逻辑、exit 逻辑，但必须保留 Freqtrade IStrategy 格式和风控安全边界。，只输出 Python 代码。类名必须为 MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_115919_v005，继承 IStrategy，timeframe='5m'，并实现 populate_indicators/populate_entry_trend/populate_exit_trend。
actual_session_parent_strategy_code=
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_064426_v003(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.035,
        "20": 0.025,
        "45": 0.018,
        "80": 0.012,
        "150": 0.006,
    }

    stoploss = -0.015

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.012
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.022
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 4,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram"] = macd["macdhist"]

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_mean_20"]

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width_mean_20"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["macd_hist_rising"] = (
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1)) &
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1) > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(2))
        )

        dataframe["bb_pctb"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"])

        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_sma"] = dataframe["atr"].rolling(window=20).mean()
        dataframe["atr_ratio"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["atr_sma"]
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_20"]) / dataframe["ema_20"]
        dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] = dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        dataframe["ema_slope"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3) * 100
        )

        dataframe["atr_norm"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14) / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["ema50_slope"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        atr_filter = (dataframe["atr_ratio"] < 1.3)

        macd_momentum = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
            (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 72) &
            (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 0.98) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            atr_filter
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02) &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"])
            )
        elif pair == "ETH/USDT":
            eth_trend_alignment_filter = (
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_20"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            eth_macd_quality_filter = (
                (dataframe["macd"] > dataframe["macd_signal"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > 0) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1))
            )
            eth_rsi_filter = (
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 65)
            )
            eth_volume_confirmation_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 1.03)
            )

            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"]) &
                (
                    (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) |
                    (dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] > 0)
                ) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 22) &
                (dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] <= 0.018) &
                eth_trend_alignment_filter &
                eth_macd_quality_filter &
                eth_rsi_filter &
                eth_volume_confirmation_filter &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001)
            )
        elif pair == "XRP/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 26) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 58) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_hist_rising"])
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
                (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 74) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["volume_ratio"] > 0.88) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
                atr_filter
            )
        else:
            long_condition = macd_momentum

        if long_condition is not None:
            dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
                1,
                "macd_cross_momentum",
            )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

注意：本轮代码修改必须基于 actual_session_parent_strategy_code，而不是仅把 nearest_candidate / pre_run 复盘当参考。
mutation_spec={"strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_115919_v005", "strategy_family": "pullback_reversal", "mutation_type": "adjust_stoploss", "reason": "pullback_reversal 族的结构假设：价格在趋势中回调到支撑位后反弹入场，天然具有更好的风险回报比，因为入场点接近止损位。父策略 v003 的核心问题是 stop_loss_profit_abs=-19.63（50笔中大量止损单吞噬ROI利润）。历史 best 仅5笔止损但亏损-9.48，说明止损宽度合理但触发频率低是关键。本轮采用 ATR 动态止损替代固定止损，让止损宽度适应当前波动率：低波动时收紧止损减少单笔亏损，高波动时适当放宽避免被噪音扫出。同时引入 pullback_reversal 入场逻辑（RSI超卖+价格触及布林下轨+EMA趋势确认），与之前的 MACD cross momentum 有结构性差异。这不是简单改阈值，而是重构入场逻辑和止损机制。session_parent_reason: 父策略 v003 在 valid_feb_2026 表现优异(PF=1.47)说明框架有潜力，但训练期和其他验证期止损损失过大，需要从入场质量和止损逻辑两方面同时改进。", "expected_effect": "通过 pullback reversal 入场逻辑，入场点更接近支撑位，止损距离更短；ATR动态止损让单笔止损亏损从平均-1.89降至-1.2~-1.5；预计交易数30~40笔（回调信号频率适中），profit_factor提升至0.85+，训练期收益率目标>-0.3%。", "changes": {"entry_logic": "替换 MACD cross momentum 为 pullback_reversal 逻辑：(1) EMA50 > EMA200 确认上升趋势；(2) RSI(14) < 35 表示超卖回调；(3) close <= bollinger_lower 或 close <= EMA20 * 0.985 表示价格回调到支撑；(4) volume > volume_sma_20 * 1.2 确认放量反弹意愿；(5) ADX > 20 确认趋势存在。entry_tag='pullback_reversal'", "entry_btc_specific": "BTC/USDT 额外要求 RSI < 32 且 ADX > 25，因为BTC在父策略中持续亏损，需要更严格的入场条件", "stoploss": "从固定 -0.025 改为基于 ATR 的动态止损：stoploss = -1.5 * ATR(14) / close，硬底线 stoploss 不低于 -0.03（防止极端波动时止损过宽），不高于 -0.012（防止过窄被噪音扫出）。custom_stoploss 实现", "minimal_roi": "{\"0\": 0.022, \"20\": 0.015, \"50\": 0.01, \"90\": 0.006, \"180\": 0.003}", "trailing_stop": "trailing_stop=True, trailing_stop_positive=0.008, trailing_stop_positive_offset=0.015, trailing_only_offset_is_reached=True（仅盈利1.5%后启用trailing）", "protections": "CooldownPeriod=5 candles; 硬性约束：
1) 当前是结构探索模式：允许不局限于 champion 小步改动，但必须吸收历史经验，避免重复已失败结构。
2) 策略必须在训练区间产生合理交易，严禁生成完全无交易策略。
2) 训练区间总交易数目标为 20~60（不是单币种）。低于 16 笔直接跳过验证；16~19 笔继续验证但仅作候选参考。超过 60 不能成为 best；超过 90 直接跳过验证。
3) 禁止连续状态型宽松入场；优先 crossed_above/crossed_below 事件触发；每个策略最多 1~2 个 entry_tag。
4) 不允许多个 OR 条件堆叠造成高频；不允许为了增加交易数而放宽入场。
3) 优先保证训练区间有稳定交易，不要把过滤条件堆得过严。
4) 如果上一轮 total_trades=0，本轮必须大幅放宽入场条件，并确保训练区间产生交易。
5) 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。
本次实际使用 5 个交易对。
自动交易数目标：
- 最低交易数：20
- 理想交易数区间：25~45
- 最大交易数：60
以上交易数目标来自 runtime_goal 的最终值，必须覆盖历史经验或旧 prompt 中的固定交易数。
6) use_exit_signal 必须为 False，不允许改为 True。
7) 仅现货 long only：不做空、不杠杆、不马丁格尔、不无限补仓，不允许 conditions_short。
8) 不调用外部 API，不读取手动交易记录。
9) 禁止使用过强过滤的全 AND 叠加（如 close>ema200_1h、rsi_1h>55、ema20>ema50>ema100、volume>rolling_mean*1.5 同时成立）。
10) 入场逻辑可更宽松，鼓励用 OR 组合：RSI 回调反弹 / EMA 短周期金叉 / 布林带下轨反弹 / MACD 转强 / 成交量不极低。
11) 不允许生成完全无交易策略，也不允许超过 90 笔训练交易。
11a) 探索模式额外硬约束：本次交易数目标 min_trades=20 / ideal_min_trades=25 / ideal_max_trades=45 / max_trades=60；入场逻辑必须围绕 25~45 笔设计；禁止明显高频；如果预计超过 60 笔，不要实现该方案。
12) 目标不是追求 0 回撤，而是在足够交易数下综合表现优于 baseline。
13) trailing 限制：禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；不要实现 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。

========== 本次运行开始前 AI 复盘总结：codegen_guidance ==========
内容来自 pre_run_ai_review.json。只作为代码生成参考，必须仍以 mutation_spec 为准，并且必须产生可检测的真实策略结构变化。
{"must_implement": ["至少一个新的市场状态/regime过滤指标（如ADX趋势强度、波动率区间、或多时间框架确认）", "对BTC/USDT的差异化入场条件（BTC波动特征与altcoin不同）", "改进的止损逻辑（如基于ATR的动态止损宽度，或入场后N根K线内不触发止损的保护期）", "entry条件中必须有可检测的逻辑差异（不能只改阈值0.001的微调）"], "avoid_equivalent_code": ["不要只改MACD参数(fast/slow/signal)的微小数值", "不要只改RSI阈值±2以内的调整", "不要只增加一个几乎不触发的极端条件作为伪过滤器", "不要复制nearest_candidate的exact逻辑只改类名"], "required_detectable_changes": ["新增至少一个populate_indicators中未出现过的技术指标计算", "populate_entry_trend中的布尔条件组合必须与父策略有结构性差异", "exit逻辑或stoploss逻辑必须有可观测的行为变化（不同的退出价格或时机）"]}

========== 用户额外代码生成规则 ==========
1. 必须真实落地 mutation_spec。
2. 禁止只改 class name、注释、变量名。
3. 如果新增过滤条件，populate_entry_trend 必须实际出现对应条件。
4. 如果新增指标，populate_indicators 必须实际计算。
5. 如果生成的策略与父策略行为等价，应主动报错，不要输出等价代码。
6. 上一轮如果因为策略重复失败，本轮禁止继续使用同一个 codegen provider，且必须改变 entry_conditions 或 indicators，不允许只改变类名、注释、变量名。
7. 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。

v005 strategy.py
文件：user_data/backtest_results/ai_optimization_runs/run_20260531_115919/v005/strategy.py
============================================================
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_115919_v005(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    # ROI table – take profit faster at lower profit levels
    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.022,
        "20": 0.015,
        "50": 0.01,
        "90": 0.006,
        "180": 0.003,
    }

    # Stop-loss will be handled by custom_stoploss
    stoploss = -0.99  # placeholder, actual stoploss is dynamic

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.008
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.015
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 5,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 96,
                "trade_limit": 5,
                "stop_duration_candles": 16,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.012,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 2,
                "stop_duration_candles": 20,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        # Trend EMAs
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)

        # RSI
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        # Bollinger Bands
        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(
            qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2
        )
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_middle"] = bollinger["middle"]

        # ADX
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        # ATR for dynamic stoploss
        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        # Volume SMA for volume confirmation
        dataframe["volume_sma_20"] = (
            dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        # ---------- pullback reversal base logic ----------
        # Trend: EMA50 > EMA200 (uptrend)
        trend_up = dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]

        # Overbought/oversold: RSI < 35 (pullback)
        rsi_pullback = dataframe["rsi_14"] < 35

        # Price at support: either close below lower Bollinger band
        # or close significantly below EMA20 (within 1.5%)
        price_near_support = (
            (dataframe["close"] <= dataframe["bb_lower"])
            | (dataframe["close"] <= dataframe["ema_20"] * 0.985)
        )

        # Volume confirmation: volume spike above average
        volume_conf = dataframe["volume"] > (dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.2)

        # ADX filter to ensure trend is present
        adx_trend = dataframe["adx"] > 20

        # Combined base condition
        base_pullback = (
            trend_up
            & rsi_pullback
            & price_near_support
            & volume_conf
            & adx_trend
        )

        # ---------- Pair-specific overlay ----------
        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            # BTC requires deeper oversold and stronger trend
            long_condition = (
                base_pullback
                & (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 32)
                & (dataframe["adx"] > 25)
            )
            entry_tag = "pullback_reversal_btc"
        # Other pairs (OP/USDT, SOL/USDT, BNB/USDT, DOGE/USDT) use base logic
        else:
            long_condition = base_pullback
            entry_tag = "pullback_reversal"

        dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            entry_tag,
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

    def custom_stoploss(
        self,
        pair: str,
        trade,
        current_time,
        current_rate: float,
        current_profit: float,
        **kwargs
    ) -> float:
        # Get the latest dataframe for this pair
        dataframe, _ = self.dp.get_analyzed_dataframe(pair, self.timeframe)
        if dataframe.empty:
            return -0.02  # fallback

        last_candle = dataframe.iloc[-1]
        atr = last_candle.get("atr", None)
        close = last_candle.get("close", None)

        if atr is None or close is None or close <= 0:
            return -0.02

        # Dynamic stoploss = -1.5 * ATR(14) relative to entry price
        dynamic_sl = -1.5 * atr / close

        # Clip to safety bounds
        dynamic_sl = max(dynamic_sl, -0.03)  # not wider than -3%
        dynamic_sl = min(dynamic_sl, -0.012)  # not tighter than -1.2%

        return dynamic_sl

```python
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_115919_v005(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    # ROI table – take profit faster at lower profit levels
    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.022,
        "20": 0.015,
        "50": 0.01,
        "90": 0.006,
        "180": 0.003,
    }

    # Stop-loss will be handled by custom_stoploss
    stoploss = -0.99  # placeholder, actual stoploss is dynamic

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.008
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.015
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 5,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 96,
                "trade_limit": 5,
                "stop_duration_candles": 16,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.012,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 2,
                "stop_duration_candles": 20,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        # Trend EMAs
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)

        # RSI
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        # Bollinger Bands
        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(
            qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2
        )
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_middle"] = bollinger["middle"]

        # ADX
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        # ATR for dynamic stoploss
        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        # Volume SMA for volume confirmation
        dataframe["volume_sma_20"] = (
            dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        # ---------- pullback reversal base logic ----------
        # Trend: EMA50 > EMA200 (uptrend)
        trend_up = dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]

        # Overbought/oversold: RSI < 35 (pullback)
        rsi_pullback = dataframe["rsi_14"] < 35

        # Price at support: either close below lower Bollinger band
        # or close significantly below EMA20 (within 1.5%)
        price_near_support = (
            (dataframe["close"] <= dataframe["bb_lower"])
            | (dataframe["close"] <= dataframe["ema_20"] * 0.985)
        )

        # Volume confirmation: volume spike above average
        volume_conf = dataframe["volume"] > (dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.2)

        # ADX filter to ensure trend is present
        adx_trend = dataframe["adx"] > 20

        # Combined base condition
        base_pullback = (
            trend_up
            & rsi_pullback
            & price_near_support
            & volume_conf
            & adx_trend
        )

        # ---------- Pair-specific overlay ----------
        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            # BTC requires deeper oversold and stronger trend
            long_condition = (
                base_pullback
                & (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 32)
                & (dataframe["adx"] > 25)
            )
            entry_tag = "pullback_reversal_btc"
        # Other pairs (OP/USDT, SOL/USDT, BNB/USDT, DOGE/USDT) use base logic
        else:
            long_condition = base_pullback
            entry_tag = "pullback_reversal"

        dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            entry_tag,
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

    def custom_stoploss(
        self,
        pair: str,
        trade,
        current_time,
        current_rate: float,
        current_profit: float,
        **kwargs
    ) -> float:
        # Get the latest dataframe for this pair
        dataframe, _ = self.dp.get_analyzed_dataframe(pair, self.timeframe)
        if dataframe.empty:
            return -0.02  # fallback

        last_candle = dataframe.iloc[-1]
        atr = last_candle.get("atr", None)
        close = last_candle.get("close", None)

        if atr is None or close is None or close <= 0:
            return -0.02

        # Dynamic stoploss = -1.5 * ATR(14) relative to entry price
        dynamic_sl = -1.5 * atr / close

        # Clip to safety bounds
        dynamic_sl = max(dynamic_sl, -0.03)  # not wider than -3%
        dynamic_sl = min(dynamic_sl, -0.012)  # not tighter than -1.2%

        return dynamic_sl
```

{
  "strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_115919_v005",
  "strategy_family": "pullback_reversal",
  "mutation_type": "adjust_stoploss",
  "reason": "pullback_reversal 族的结构假设：价格在趋势中回调到支撑位后反弹入场，天然具有更好的风险回报比，因为入场点接近止损位。父策略 v003 的核心问题是 stop_loss_profit_abs=-19.63（50笔中大量止损单吞噬ROI利润）。历史 best 仅5笔止损但亏损-9.48，说明止损宽度合理但触发频率低是关键。本轮采用 ATR 动态止损替代固定止损，让止损宽度适应当前波动率：低波动时收紧止损减少单笔亏损，高波动时适当放宽避免被噪音扫出。同时引入 pullback_reversal 入场逻辑（RSI超卖+价格触及布林下轨+EMA趋势确认），与之前的 MACD cross momentum 有结构性差异。这不是简单改阈值，而是重构入场逻辑和止损机制。session_parent_reason: 父策略 v003 在 valid_feb_2026 表现优异(PF=1.47)说明框架有潜力，但训练期和其他验证期止损损失过大，需要从入场质量和止损逻辑两方面同时改进。",
  "expected_effect": "通过 pullback reversal 入场逻辑，入场点更接近支撑位，止损距离更短；ATR动态止损让单笔止损亏损从平均-1.89降至-1.2~-1.5；预计交易数30~40笔（回调信号频率适中），profit_factor提升至0.85+，训练期收益率目标>-0.3%。",
  "changes": {
    "entry_logic": "替换 MACD cross momentum 为 pullback_reversal 逻辑：(1) EMA50 > EMA200 确认上升趋势；(2) RSI(14) < 35 表示超卖回调；(3) close <= bollinger_lower 或 close <= EMA20 * 0.985 表示价格回调到支撑；(4) volume > volume_sma_20 * 1.2 确认放量反弹意愿；(5) ADX > 20 确认趋势存在。entry_tag='pullback_reversal'",
    "entry_btc_specific": "BTC/USDT 额外要求 RSI < 32 且 ADX > 25，因为BTC在父策略中持续亏损，需要更严格的入场条件",
    "stoploss": "从固定 -0.025 改为基于 ATR 的动态止损：stoploss = -1.5 * ATR(14) / close，硬底线 stoploss 不低于 -0.03（防止极端波动时止损过宽），不高于 -0.012（防止过窄被噪音扫出）。custom_stoploss 实现",
    "minimal_roi": "{\"0\": 0.022, \"20\": 0.015, \"50\": 0.01, \"90\": 0.006, \"180\": 0.003}",
    "trailing_stop": "trailing_stop=True, trailing_stop_positive=0.008, trailing_stop_positive_offset=0.015, trailing_only_offset_is_reached=True（仅盈利1.5%后启用trailing）",
    "protections": "CooldownPeriod=5 candles; StoplossGuard lookback=48 trade_limit=2 stop_duration=20 per_pair=True; MaxDrawdown lookback=96 trade_limit=5 stop_duration=16 max_allowed_drawdown=0.012",
    "new_indicators": "增加 EMA20, EMA50, EMA200, ATR(14), volume_sma_20；保留 RSI(14), Bollinger Bands, ADX"
  },
  "do_not_change": [
    "timeframe=5m",
    "use_exit_signal=False",
    "spot long-only",
    "5个交易对不变(BTC/USDT, OP/USDT, SOL/USDT, BNB/USDT, DOGE/USDT)",
    "IStrategy格式",
    "不做空不杠杆不马丁格尔不外部API"
  ],
  "session_parent_reason": "基于 actual_session_parent MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_064426_v003 进行结构性重构。该策略在 valid_feb_2026 达到 PF=1.47 证明框架有潜力，但训练期 stop_loss_profit_abs=-19.63 是核心瓶颈。本轮从入场逻辑（pullback reversal替代MACD cross）和止损机制（ATR动态替代固定）两个维度同时改进，属于结构探索而非微调。"
}
